title: Ads Vanillatrue Birds RP
description: This new texturepack will turn the Parrot Variants into different Bird Variants, including Crow, Falcon, Pigeon and Bluebird, without need of Optifine. The Red Parrot remains.
body:
I changed the parrot version to a bigger variety of Bird types since we don't live in a world with only parrots.. makes sense does it.

No model changes, only texture.
